summary: Good‑quality source captures an excellent show highlighted by a stellar Comes A Time and a fun, joke‑filled Truckin' featuring Jerry’s witty banter.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance, calling it one of the best shows they’ve heard with standout moments on Comes A Time and a lively Truckin' that showcases Jerry Garcia’s humor and pedal‑steel work during the NRPS set. The recording is praised implicitly – no audio flaws are mentioned – suggesting a clean, listenable source even though its exact origin isn’t specified.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on the musical performance (70% weight) and no reported audio problems (30% weight) lead to a high overall rating despite limited detail about the recording source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not note any sound issues; they refer to half‑track tapes as the likely source, implying decent fidelity but no explicit description of soundboard or audience mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The evening is described as an excellent, merriment‑filled performance with smooth transitions and memorable moments, especially Jerry’s witty remarks and pedal‑steel work.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for wry comments, sarcastic string scratching before Truckin', and excellent pedal‑steel guitar work during the NRPS set.
